top_trades.reason: Massive size of 6,280 contracts with $647k premium represents enormous bearish conviction. Despite being 16% OTM, this near-term March 2026 expiration suggests expectation of a significant 16% downside move in TSLA. The zero bid price and wide spread indicates this may be part of a complex strategy, but the sheer volume makes it highly notable.

The tight bid-ask spread (3.20-3.45) and massive volume indicates strong bullish conviction that NVDA will move above $190 by March 2026. This represents significant buying pressure at a relatively cheap premium per contract.

Deep ITM put with $1.63M premium betting MSFT stays below $655, which is 61% above current price. This appears to be a synthetic short or hedging position with high capital commitment. The tight spread and March 2026 expiration suggests institutional positioning for downside protection or bearish leverage on any rally.

Extremely deep ITM put at 126% above current META price with nearly $500k premium. This is clearly a synthetic short position or sophisticated hedge given the extreme strike selection. Multiple similar META deep ITM puts in the flow suggest coordinated institutional positioning.

Large 120 contract position worth $392k on ITM calls that are 11.8% in-the-money. This bullish position benefits from any continued upside in AAPL with March 2026 expiration providing time for the trade to work.
